chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S-1145 OF 2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D/O MATTER 1 FOR ORDERS ON CMA. NO.4219/2025 2. FOR HEARING OF CMA. NO.4667/2024 05.06.2025 Mr. Arif Awan, advocate for the petitioner ------------------------- 1. Learned counsel has drawn attention to order dated 08.04.2024 whereby instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. Against such application for restoration under Order IX rule 13, CPC was filed wherein it was stated that the counsel for petitioner fell down from the stairs and, therefore, got seriously injured and was unable to attend the Court on the said date. Despite notice to respondent No.1 since last few dates, no one is appearing on behalf of said Respondent. Explanation given on oath appears to be sufficient to explain the position. Application, is therefore, allowed and the order dated 08.04.2024 is recalled and the petition stands restored to its original position as on the said date. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI
